title: Social Security Fund Faces a 2032 Shortfall

source.title: Social Security is on track to become insolvent by 2032, putting benefits at risk of a cut

segments.title: Who Receives Benefits
segments.audioText: More than 62 million Americans receive benefits from the Old-Age and Survivors Insurance fund.
segments.transcript: More than 62 million Americans receive benefits from the Old-Age and Survivors Insurance fund.
segments.translationZh: 超過六千二百萬美國人由『老年及遺屬保險基金』領取福利。

points.label: More than 62 million Americans
points.explanationZh: More than 即『超過』；聽數字時先抓 62 million，再聽 Americans。

points.label: receive benefits
points.explanationZh: receive 係『收到、領取』；benefits 喺呢度指政府福利或保障金。

points.label: Old-Age and Survivors Insurance fund
points.explanationZh: 呢個係基金正式名稱，聽唔晒都可以先抓 fund，知道係一個資金來源。

segments.title: By 2032
segments.audioText: But by the end of 2032, the fund will only have the resources to pay out 78% of its scheduled benefits.
segments.transcript: But by the end of 2032, the fund will only have the resources to pay out 78% of its scheduled benefits.
segments.translationZh: 但到 2032 年底，呢個基金只會有資源支付原定福利嘅百分之七十八。

points.label: by the end of 2032
points.explanationZh: by the end of... 即『到……完結之前／到……年底』，新聞講時間好常用。

points.label: will only have the resources
points.explanationZh: only have the resources 表示資源有限；resources 呢度係錢同資金能力。

points.label: pay out 78%
points.explanationZh: pay out 指支付出去；78% 要聽成 seventy-eight percent。

segments.title: At Risk of a Cut
segments.audioText: Social Security is on track to become insolvent by the end of 2032.
segments.transcript: Social Security is on track to become insolvent by the end of 2032.
segments.translationZh: 社會保障制度正朝住 2032 年底資金不足嘅方向發展。

points.label: Social Security
points.explanationZh: Social Security 係美國社會保障制度，通常同退休金、殘障、遺屬福利有關。

points.label: is on track to become
points.explanationZh: on track to 表示『按目前情況會走向……』，語氣係根據趨勢判斷。

points.label: insolvent
points.explanationZh: insolvent 指資金不足、無法完全支付應付嘅款項，唔等於完全停晒付款。

segments.title: Reduced Monthly Benefits
segments.audioText: That would amount to, on average, nearly $500 in reduced monthly benefits.
segments.transcript: That would amount to, on average, nearly $500 in reduced monthly benefits.
segments.translationZh: 平均嚟講，呢個相當於每月福利減少接近五百美元。

points.label: That would amount to
points.explanationZh: amount to 即『等於、相當於』，用嚟講結果或總數。

points.label: on average
points.explanationZh: on average 即『平均嚟講』，插入句中時前後會有短暫停頓。

points.label: reduced monthly benefits
points.explanationZh: reduced 即減少咗嘅；monthly benefits 係每月福利金。

sentences: More than 62 million Americans receive benefits from the Old-Age and Survivors Insurance fund.
But by the end of 2032, the fund will only have the resources to pay out 78% of its scheduled benefits.
Social Security is on track to become insolvent by the end of 2032.
That would amount to, on average, nearly $500 in reduced monthly benefits.

vocabulary.example: Many retirees depend on monthly benefits.
vocabulary.translationZh: 好多退休人士依靠每月福利金。

vocabulary.example: The fund helps pay for the program.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個基金幫手支付呢個計劃。

vocabulary.example: The agency needs more resources to serve people.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個機構需要更多資源去服務市民。

vocabulary.example: The scheduled payment arrives next week.

vocabulary.meaningZh: 資金不足嘅；無力完全付款嘅
vocabulary.example: The report warned that the fund could become insolvent.
vocabulary.translationZh: 報告警告基金可能會變成資金不足。

vocabulary.example: Some families worry about reduced benefits.
vocabulary.translationZh: 有啲家庭擔心福利金減少。

phrases.example: More than 62 million Americans receive benefits.
The fund could face pressure by the end of 2032.
The program is on track to become more expensive.
That would cost, on average, nearly $500.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，將 More than 62 million Americans 當成一個數字 chunk。
重播 00:18，先聽寫 by the end of 2032，再補 78% of its scheduled benefits。
用 on track to become 練替換：The project is on track to finish next week.
用兩句英文複述：Social Security may face a shortfall by 2032. Benefits could be reduced if Congress does not act.

notes: 今日重點係 MoneyWatch 新聞入面嘅數字同制度用語：benefits、fund、resources、insolvent。
時間碼 00:00、00:18、00:41、01:19 可以逐句重播；先抓數字，再抓動詞 receive、pay out、amount to。
insolvent 聽落難，但意思可以簡化理解為『資金唔夠支付全部承諾』；跟讀時重音喺第二音節。
dailyLifePractice 會避開投資或法律建議，轉去日常安全場景：改約時間、電話確認同工作更新。

dailyLifePractice.title: Rescheduling an Appointment
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你臨時有事，想打電話改約時間，語氣要有禮貌但簡短。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment. Do you have anything open next week? Wednesday afternoon would work for me.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment.
lines.zh: 你好，我想改一改我嘅預約時間。

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: Sure. What day works for you?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Do you have anything open next week?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Wednesday afternoon would work for me.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: anything open 係好自然嘅問法，意思係『有冇空位／時間』。would work for me 比 I can do... 更柔和。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 Wednesday afternoon 換成你方便嘅時間。
drills.example: Friday morning would work for me.

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Do you have anything open next week? 三次。
drills.example: Do you have anything open next week?

dailyLifePractice.title: Clarifying on a Phone Call
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：電話入面對方講得快，你想禮貌請佢重講或確認一個資料。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Sorry, could you say that one more time? I just want to make sure I have the right date. So that's June twenty-fourth, correct?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Sorry, could you say that one more time?
lines.zh: 唔好意思，可唔可以再講一次？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I just want to make sure I have the right date.
lines.zh: 我只係想確認我記啱日期。

lines.speaker: You
lines.zh: 即係六月二十四號，啱嗎？

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: I just want to make sure... 係美國電話溝通好常用，聽落唔係質疑對方，只係禮貌確認。correct? 放句尾可以柔和咁確認資料。

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 你聽唔清楚地址，請對方再講一次。
drills.example: Sorry, could you say the address one more time?

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I just want to make sure... 確認時間。
drills.example: I just want to make sure I have the right time.

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick Work Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：工作或小組項目入面，你要簡短講進度同下一步。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick update: I'm almost done with the notes. I just need to clean up a few numbers. I'll send it over this afternoon.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick update: I'm almost done with the notes.
lines.zh: 快快更新一下：我啲筆記差唔多完成。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Sounds good. Need another set of eyes?
lines.zh: 好呀。要唔要多個人幫你睇睇？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I just need to clean up a few numbers.
lines.zh: 我只係要整理一下幾個數字。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll send it over this afternoon.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick update: 係自然嘅職場開場。clean up a few numbers 唔係清潔，係整理、檢查幾個數字，語氣輕鬆。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 the notes 換成 the slides、the report 或 the email。
drills.example: I'm almost done with the report.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 I'll send it over... 講你會幾時傳資料。
drills.example: I'll send it over tomorrow morning.
